historical_winpct.notes: 3-18 Big East. Down year. Approaching 1000 all-time program wins.
Lost to Rutgers 11-4 on 4/8/25 (third straight year).
Big Ten Tournament berth. Won 4 of last 5 conf series.
Beat Seton Hall 11-4 on 4/8/25 — 3rd straight year over SHU.
Hosted NCAA D3 Regional. First NCAA Tourney win since 2008. 14-4 NJAC, 2nd.
Active NJAC season. Sam Angelo hit for cycle vs NJCU (25-10 win 4/14).
T-3 NJAC at 12-6. Strong postseason form.
Strong season. Multiple NJAC Rookie of the Week honors (Tarabokia).
Swept Ramapo 3-2/3-1 on 4/10. Sophia Alonso hit 2 triples vs Neumann 3/21/25.
Amber Reed had 3 doubles vs John Jay 3/30/23.
Angelina Benitez .405 AVG, 47 H, 7th in Big East.
5-3 NJAC at time of 4/10 doubleheader vs Montclair St.
1st MAC Freedom (6-0). 8-game win streak. Top local D3 lacrosse story.
Strong NCAA Tournament run. Top offense (Caroline Ling 63G/34A). Kate Theofield All-Freshman.
MCT Final runner-up to Mt Olive
Gold standard for Sussex/Warren/Hunterdon. Lost 14-3 to Seton Hall Prep 5/16.
8-5 record as of 4/21. Strong NP-A baseball.
Top tier Bergen Co program — populate
Lost to Ridgewood 13-7 in Bergen Co Final 5/10. IHA alum Gabby Shadek now at Duke.
Strong pipeline — Sofia Vega + Kennedy DeMott now at Quinnipiac D1.
